news.headline: Ferrellgas Partners, L.P. reported its Q2 FY2025 results with the quarter ending on January 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Liberty, Missouri, on March 07, 2025, Ferrellgas Partners, L.P. (OTC: FGPR), also known as Ferrellgas, disclosed their financial performance for the second quarter of the 2025 fiscal year which concluded on January 31, 2025.

Stocks fell, Trump criticized 'globalists'. Nvidia, Tesla, Palantir, Netflix dropped. Broadcom rose. Jobs report awaited.
news.summary: Stocks took a significant hit recently after President Trump criticized "globalists," causing the market to tumble. Key players such as Nvidia, Tesla, Palantir, and Netflix experienced substantial losses, while Broadcom saw a late surge. As investors eagerly await the upcoming jobs report, the impact of Trump's remarks on the market remains a focal point. The Dow Jones Futures forecast uncertainty amid these developments, with all eyes on how the market will respond in the coming days.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures up pre-jobs report and Powell speech; Nvidia partner Hewlett Packard Enterprise crashes post earning.
news.summary: On Friday, Dow Jones futures increased in anticipation of the upcoming jobs report and a speech by Fed Chair Powell. Hewlett Packard Enterprise, a partner of Nvidia, experienced a significant drop in earnings. The market is eagerly awaiting the latest updates, with key economic indicators and corporate performances under scrutiny. It is a pivotal moment for investors as they await crucial insights from these events.

news.headline: SEALSQ chip in Switzerland protects crypto wallets from quantum threats, ensuring long-term security. Visit link for more.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Geneva, Switzerland, a groundbreaking hardware solution was unveiled to safeguard digital assets in the post-quantum era. This innovative technology aims to provide long-term security for crypto wallets against emerging threats from quantum computing. For further details, interested parties can visit the following link: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/protecting-crypto-wallets-from-quantum-computing-threats-carlos-km65e/.

news.headline: Kremlin: Putin and Serbia's Vucic discuss energy cooperation.
EU accelerates banking review due to increasing threat from Wall Street, aiming to address concerns promptly.
Eye-Net’s Cellular-Based V2X solution passes Euro NCAP validation after UTAC testing, enabling European market expansion.
news.summary: Eye-Net's compliance validation has paved the way for their expansion into the European market after passing UTAC testing. This achievement is significant as it allows Eye-Net to access a market with a population of over 740 million people. The successful testing also opens up opportunities for the company to tap into a market with a GDP of over $18 trillion. This development marks a major milestone for Eye-Net as they continue to grow their presence and impact in the global market.

news.headline: Costco Q2 revenue beats at $63.72B, EPS misses at $4.02 per share. Comps up 6.8% driven by US strength.
news.summary: Costco Wholesale Corp (NASDAQ:COST) released their second-quarter financial results after market close on Thursday. They reported a second-quarter revenue of $63.72 billion, surpassing the estimated $63.13 billion. Their adjusted earnings per share for the quarter were $4.02, falling short of the predicted $4.10 per share. Net sales for the quarter rose by 9.1% compared to the previous year. In the U.S., comparable sales increased by 8.3%. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: IS&S to join Q1 Investor Summit Virtual Conference on Mar 11, 2025. CEO & CFO to attend, available for one-on-one meetings.
news.summary: CEO Shahram Askarpour and CFO Jeffrey DiGiovanni of Innovative Solutions & Support (NASDAQ: ISSC) will be attending the Q1 Investor Summit Virtual Conference on March 11, 2025. IS&S executives will also hold individual meetings with registered investors. Visit the conference website for more details.

news.headline: Corvias recognized nationally for excellence in military housing for 11th consecutive year. North Carolina bases mentioned in acknowledgment.
news.summary: In a news release dated March 4, 2025, the second bullet point should be corrected to show the following military bases in North Carolina: Ardennes/Bataan, Hammond Hills, Nijmegen, Normandy Bluffs, Pope AFB, Ste. Mere Eglise, Randolph Pointe, Linden Oaks, Corregidor/Bougainville, and Casablanca/Anzio Acres. The previous mention of North Carolina (Fort Liberty) should be changed to North Carolina (Fort Bragg).

news.headline: Assurant earns 4th Great Place to Work certification in the US; ~90% of current employees rate it positively.
news.summary: Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a global protection company specializing in safeguarding and servicing connected devices, homes, and automobiles in collaboration with top brands, has been certified by Great Place to Work® in the U.S. for the fourth consecutive year. This recognition is solely derived from feedback from current Assurant U.S. employees. The company achieved an impressive rating, with nearly 90% of employees considering it a great place to work, indicating a 32-point increase compared to the previous year.

news.headline: Investors jittery as markets react to unpredictable policy changes, concerns over economic growth & impact of tariffs on trading partners.
news.summary: Economic growth concerns are mounting among investors due to uncertainties surrounding tariffs imposed on America's primary trading allies.

news.headline: VERSES® CEO to speak at 37th Roth Conference on March 16-18 about AI-Life After Deepseek.
news.summary: Gabriel René, the CEO, will be participating in a panel discussion titled "AI-Life After Deepseek." René will be sharing insights and expertise in the field of artificial intelligence technology. This panel discussion will bring together industry experts and thought leaders to discuss the future implications of Deepseek technology. Gabriel René's participation highlights the significance of his knowledge in this area, as he joins other professionals to explore the impact of AI on various aspects of life post-Deepseek.

news.headline: Markets jittery after series of policy changes, investors concerned about growth and tariffs on top trading partners.
news.summary: Concerns among investors are rising due to potential negative impacts on economic growth and trading partners of America as a result of tariffs.

news.headline: Wall Street analysts adjust Paymentus price expectations ahead of Q4 earnings. Expected earnings at 12 cents/share and revenue at $222.06 million. Paymentus shares closed at $25.95.
news.summary: Paymentus Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:PAY) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on March 10. Analysts predict earnings of 12 cents per share, up from 9 cents per share last year. The company anticipates Q4 revenue of $222.06 million, up from $164.8 million a year ago. In the Q3 report on Nov. 12, 2024, Paymentus exceeded expectations and provided FY24 revenue guidance surpassing estimates. Paymentus' stock closed at $25.95 on Thursday, marking a 0.2% decrease. For more details, visit Benzinga.com for updated analyst ratings and the full story.

news.headline: Spencer Ford is the new Director of Lacrosse at The St. James, overseeing Academy, Grassroots, and Club programs.
news.summary: Renowned coach Spencer Ford has been appointed as the Director of Lacrosse at The St. James in Springfield, Virginia starting March 7, 2025. As a former professional player, Ford will be in charge of managing various lacrosse programs within the academy, including Boys Grassroots and Club programs. This marks an important development for The St. James in enhancing its lacrosse offerings under the leadership of a championship coach with extensive experience in the sport.

news.headline: United Airlines installs Starlink on first regional aircraft, plans to equip 40+ monthly by 2025. Installation in 8 hours, 10x faster.
news.summary: An airline plans to install Starlink technology on over 40 regional aircraft per month until the end of 2025. The average installation time for Starlink is approximately 8 hours, making it 10 times faster than other non-Starlink equipment. United showcases technical advantages such as reduced equipment size and weight, along with ease of installation, leading to operational benefits.

news.headline: National Cereal Day celebrates the health benefits of cereal, the top source of fiber with 7 out of 10 Americans enjoying it.
news.summary: Today, on National Cereal Day (March 7), individuals are encouraged to revisit the beloved breakfast staple of cereal and explore the various benefits available in the cereal aisle. Surprisingly, cereal stands as the primary source of fiber for many, offering a convenient way to boost daily nutrient intake. The celebration sheds light on this underrated nutritional powerhouse, emphasizing its significance in providing essential dietary fiber to consumers.

news.headline: Clear Channel Outdoor names Eric Hamme as Chicago Market President, a 19-year ad sales veteran. NYSE: CCO.
news.summary: With 19 years of experience in advertising sales, Eric Hamme has been selected as the new president of Clear Channel Outdoor Americas (CCOA) in Chicago, the nation's third-largest media market. This appointment, disclosed on March 7, 2025, marks a strategic move by CCOA to boost business growth and foster innovative out-of-home advertising solutions in the region. CCOA, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as CCO, aims to leverage Hamme's expertise to drive advancements in the market.

news.headline: SeekOps names Brendan Smith as CEO, a global GHG emissions detection leader. Smith, CTO, founder, to lead. Board confident in team for global scaling.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, SeekOps Inc, known for its greenhouse gas emissions detection solutions worldwide, has appointed Brendan Smith as the new CEO. Having served as the Chief Technology Officer and a company founder, Smith's promotion signals the board's trust in their leadership team. This move aligns with SeekOps' strategy for further global expansion after experiencing ongoing success in the industry.

news.headline: Book "Moonset on Desert Sands" by Sherri L. Dodd, a paranormal thriller, to be released on 03/27/25, featuring magic, suspense, and family betrayal.
news.summary: In Gilroy, California, on March 7, 2025, the upcoming book "Moonset on Desert Sands" by Sherri L. Dodd is set to release on March 27, 2025. The story follows Arista and her great-aunt Bethie who previously faced a serial killer, only to now confront the ominous return of Arista's bloodthirsty uncle. The chilling narrative is poised to captivate readers with its suspenseful plot.

news.headline: Live music events in March 2025 at Jimmy's Jazz & Blues Club in Portsmouth, featuring diverse performances beyond jazz & blues.
news.summary: In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, as of March 7, 2025, visitors can immerse themselves in the lively ambiance at Jimmy's Jazz & Blues Club. Throughout this month, audiences can witness a diverse range of live shows featuring talented performers. The lineup includes up-and-coming artists along with versatile musicians who explore various genres. Jimmy's offers a refreshing take on entertainment beyond jazz and blues, providing a platform for artists to showcase their skills and creativity.

news.headline: Bridger Aerospace to release Q4 2024 financial results on March 13, 2025, after the market close.
news.summary: A large aerial firefighting company, Bridger Aerospace Group Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BAER, BAERW), based in Belgrade, Montana, will be reporting its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on March 13, 2025, after the market closes. Bridger Aerospace is known as one of the major players in the industry. The announcement is significant as it will provide insight into the company's performance during the last quarter of 2024, ending on December 31. This news is expected to have an impact on the company's stock market standing and overall investor sentiment.

news.headline: In 2024, Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. reports revenue of $72.1 million (+2.5% vs. 2023) with organic revenue growth of +11.4%. GAAP net income from continuing operations is $2.5 million vs. a loss of ($3.7) million in 2023. In Q4, revenue was $23.0 million (+19.2% vs. Q4 2023) with strong organic revenue growth of +44.3%. Non-GAAP adjusted EBITDA for the year was $3.2 million vs. $2.7 million in 2023. CEO highlighted progress in strategic plan and new acquisitions, leading to financial improvements. Annual SG&A spend decreased by $1 million in 2024. Stockholders' equity stands at $8.2 million.
news.summary: Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. reported financial results for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. The company had revenue of $72.1 million, a 2.5% increase from the previous year, with organic revenue growth of 11.4%. Gross margin declined to 23.4%, but GAAP net income from continuing operations improved to $2.5 million from a loss of $3.7 million in 2023. Non-GAAP adjusted net income was $2.1 million, with adjusted EBITDA at $3.2 million.In the fourth quarter, revenue was $23.0 million, up 19.2% from Q4 2023, and organic revenue growth was 44.3%. Gross margin declined to 20.9%, but GAAP net income improved to ($0.2) million from ($1.4) million in Q4 2023. Non-GAAP adjusted net income was $618 thousand, with adjusted EBITDA at $880 thousand.The company completed acquisitions of Golden Organics and LoCo Food Distribution. New retail sales generated revenue of $5.3 million, and acquisitions contributed $838 thousand. The CEO highlighted the positive trajectory of the business and strong growth opportunities. Future growth plans and financial risks were also discussed. The company's balance sheet showed total assets of $27.3 million and total liabilities of $19.2 million, with stockholders' equity at $8.17 million.

news.headline: KB Home unveils two new communities in Fresno, California: Parkside and Edgewood at Peach Avenue. Homes feature modern interiors.
news.summary: In Fresno, California, KB Home, a leading U.S. homebuilder (NYSE: KBH), has unveiled Parkside and Edgewood at Peach Avenue. These two new housing developments cater to contemporary living needs, boasting trendy interior designs such as spacious kitchens opening into large great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and plentiful storage options. The properties feature a mix of one- and two-story homes, designed to meet the demands of modern lifestyles. This unveiling marks KB Home's continued investment in quality housing options for potential buyers in the Fresno area.

news.headline: US asking rents rose 0.4% to $1,607 in Feb, first increase in 6 months & largest in 9 months - Redfin report.
news.summary: In Seattle, the median U.S. asking rent saw a 0.4% year-over-year increase to $1,607 in February. This marks the first rise in six months and the largest in nine months, as reported by Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN). Month-to-month, asking rents also increased by 0.6%. While there has been a recent uptick in February, asking rents have remained relatively stable over the past 10 months, in contrast to the significant fluctuations seen in previous years.

news.headline: 2024 Q4 results revealed by Creative Media & Community Trust Corporation.

Trump: Big globalists have been ripping off the US.
Nasdaq to join exchanges offering 24/7 trading.

HR AI is proving to be transformational with global SAP HR AI engagements showing solid benefits, beyond just saving time. Analysis by Josh Bersin Company is changing the narrative around AI's impact, highlighting it as a catalyst for change.
news.summary: CHROs have long been advised that AI has the potential to bring about significant transformations, but there has been a lack of concrete evidence to support this claim. However, a recent analysis conducted by Josh Bersin Company on worldwide SAP HR AI implementations is changing this narrative. The study uncovers tangible benefits generated from these AI engagements, highlighting the positive impact of AI in the HR sector. This analysis is now bolstering the argument for AI as a facilitator of innovation rather than a threat to jobs, providing a solid foundation for the integration of AI technologies in HR practices.

news.headline: Ryan Blust appointed as Interim CFO for Trulieve Cannabis Corp. in the US.
news.summary: In Tallahassee, Florida on March 7, 2025, a notable cannabis company, Trulieve Cannabis Corp. (CSE: TRUL) (OTCQX: TCNNF), appointed Ryan Blust, their Vice President of Finance. Trulieve is a prominent player in the U.S. cannabis sector.

news.headline: BIMZELX® data at AAD: 55.7% of HS patients had no draining tunnels after 2 years of treatment.
news.summary: Around 55.7% of 425 patients with hidradenitis suppurativa (HS) who had at least one draining tunnel (DT) at the beginning of the study did not have any DTs after two years of treatment. DTs are described as painful tunnels under the skin that release pus due to prolonged inflammation.

news.headline: Americans will advocate for civic education during Civic Learning Week, March 10-14, 2025. Events will feature Condoleezza Rice & Ken Burns, emphasizing the impact of civic education with thousands participating.
news.summary: Events taking place across the country will showcase the importance of civic education, with appearances by prominent figures such as the 66th Secretary of State, Condoleezza Rice, and filmmaker Ken Burns. These events will be attended by thousands and will lead up to the Civic Learning Week National Forum, co-hosted by the Center for Revitalizing American Institutions at The.

news.headline: 'Rule Breakers' movie celebrates Afghan Dreamers Robotics Team captained by Somaya Faruqi. She led team to victory in competitions worldwide and built a ventilator out of car parts. Bold advocate for education after fleeing country.
news.summary: Somaya Faruqi, the Captain of Afghan Dreamers and Education Cannot Wait Global Champion, successfully guided her team to victory in robotics competitions worldwide. She also fabricated a ventilator using car parts. Despite fleeing her country, Faruqi remains dedicated to advocating for education.

news.headline: BIMZELX® shows 67.7% of patients with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis achieved sustained complete skin clearance over five years.
news.summary: Over a span of five years, a study involving 153 patients who were part of the second extension of BE BRIGHT revealed that 67.7% of individuals with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis (PSO) and were treated with BIMZELX® (bimekizumab-bkzx) attained PASI100+ levels. This sustained complete skin clearance showcased the durable and extensive effectiveness of the treatment.

news.headline: Acurx Pharmaceuticals announces $1.1M direct offering for new antibiotics development.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Staten Island, Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACXP), a company specializing in developing innovative antibiotics for challenging bacterial infections, revealed that it has initiated a new venture.
